title: AI Assistant
prompt_placeholder: Describe the article you want to create
refactor_description: Enter an instruction to update the current text.
Translation source is the default site l: Translations always use the site default language as the source. It cannot be changed here.
Navigation source site help: The tree is copied from the site where your navigation already has linked pages (the default site is used first when it has entries).
This action is not available for single: This action is not available for single site installations.
Source and destination languages cannot: Source and destination languages cannot be the same.
Source language entry does not exist for: Source language entry does not exist for entry :title
Translation queued message: :count translation job(s) were queued. Open Bulk translations (Tools) to track progress.
Translate your content across languages: Translate your content across languages using DeepL
No linked entries in this navigation.
Choose a source, entries, and target lan: Choose a source, entries, and target languages to see the estimate.
Hide fully translated help: Hides rows that already have a localized page in every other language (nothing left to add).
Title: Title
No entries found in this collection.
Existing translations in the destination: Existing translations in the destination language will be replaced.
Target languages help: Use the checkboxes to choose one or more languages. Only those will receive translations. Each selected page is translated once per language you tick.
Target languages help navigation: Use the checkboxes to choose which site languages should get a copy of the navigation structure. Only those are updated; missing pages are translated with DeepL first.
Select at least one target language: Select at least one target language.
Select at least one destination language: Select at least one destination language.
Skip existing callout: Pages that already have a translation in a target language will be skipped unless you enable overwrite in the next step.
Conflict without overwrite message: Some selected pages already have a translation in at least one of your target languages. Enable "Overwrite existing translations" to replace them, or change your selection.
Conflict detail intro: For each target language, these pages already have a translation:
Conflicting target languages detail: These target languages already have translations for your selection and would be skipped or require overwrite: :languages.
Target language already translated badge: At least one selected page already has a translation in this language
Will translate :count entry(ies) to :lan: Will translate :count entry(ies) to :lang using DeepL
Will translate :entries entries into :la: Will translate :entries entries into :langs (:ops operations) using DeepL.
Choose sources and targets to see the es: Choose a collection or navigation, entries, and target languages to see the estimate.
Overwrite confirmation body: You chose to overwrite existing translations. DeepL will replace content in the target locales for the selected pages.
Overwrite confirmation bullet 1: Existing localized fields in the destination language will be replaced.
Overwrite confirmation bullet 2: This cannot be undone from here—use revisions or backups if you need to undo.
Do not leave page during translation: Do not close or leave this page until translation finishes.
Source or destination site not found.
This collection does not support multipl: This collection does not support multiple languages.
Failed to dispatch translation batch. Ma: Failed to dispatch translation batch. Make sure a queue driver is configured.
Empty response from DeepL. Verify your A: Empty response from DeepL. Verify your API key.
DeepL usage limit reached: Your DeepL quota for this billing period is reached or exceeded.
DeepL cost estimate formula: :base base fee + :chars account characters at :perM per million characters (this billing period).
DeepL cost estimate disclaimer: This estimate is indicative only. Your actual DeepL invoice may differ — confirm usage and pricing in your DeepL account.
DeepL cost estimate disclaimer short: Rough estimate — confirm in your DeepL account.
DeepL usage not available for account: Detailed usage is not available for this DeepL account type.
Describe what you need and let AI genera: Describe what you need and let AI generate the content for you
Choose the collection and blueprint for: Choose the collection and blueprint for your new entry.
Fields not shown here (assets, sections,: Fields not shown here (assets, sections, etc.) will need to be filled manually after creation.
Tell the AI what content you want. Be as: Tell the AI what content you want. Be as specific as you can.
Drag & drop a PDF or text file, or: Drag & drop a PDF or text file, or
Only PDF and TXT files are supported.
File is too large. Maximum 10 MB.
Review and edit the generated content be: Review and edit the generated content before creating the entry.
Now describe the content you want. You c: Now describe the content you want. You can attach a file below.
Describe what you need. I will choose th: Describe what you need. I will choose the best collection and blueprint, then draft the entry for you.
Taking a look at what you asked for…: Taking a look at what you asked for…
Shaping the page in our mind…: Shaping the page in our mind…
Finding the best home for this content o: Finding the best home for this content on your site.
Turning your notes into ready-to-use con: Turning your notes into ready-to-use content.
This usually takes a few moments.
Describe what you need. I can create one: Describe what you need. I can create one entry — or several at once across different collections.
Tell me what you want. Examples:: Tell me what you want. Examples:
“Create a page about our new pilot progr: “Create a page about our new pilot program”
“Create 2 pages: one about us, one about: “Create 2 pages: one about us, one about our pilot program”
“A blog post about our 5-year anniversar: “A blog post about our 5-year anniversary and a page about Joe, our new CTO”
Describe one or more entries you want to: Describe one or more entries you want to create…
Figuring out how many entries to create: Figuring out how many entries to create and where each one fits.
Drafting — :label: Drafting — :label
Finished — :label: Finished — :label
Could not finish — :label: Could not finish — :label
Review each generated entry. Save the on: Review each generated entry. Save the ones you want; discard or retry the rest.
Read-only snapshot of the generated cont: Read-only snapshot of the generated content. Save to edit all fields in the Control Panel.
:n more entries were requested but only: :n more entries were requested but only the first :max will be created. Ask again to create the rest.
Skipped entry #:n: invalid collection or: Skipped entry #:n: invalid collection or blueprint returned by the AI.
BOLD agent — working in the background…: BOLD agent — working in the background…
BOLD agent: 1 entry is ready to review.
BOLD agent: :n entries are ready to revi: BOLD agent: :n entries are ready to review.
BOLD agent: :ready ready, :failed failed: BOLD agent: :ready ready, :failed failed. Open the assistant to review.
BOLD agent: generation failed for all en: BOLD agent: generation failed for all entries.
BOLD agent: generation failed. Open the: BOLD agent: generation failed. Open the assistant to see why.
No entries have been drafted yet.
Save & edit is available after every ent: Save & edit is available after every entry has finished generating.
Edit becomes available after every entry: Edit becomes available after every entry has finished generating.
:field was missing or empty but is requi: :field was missing or empty but is required; a safe default was applied.
:field is required but no video URL was: :field is required but no video URL was provided. Add a URL in the editor after saving.
:field is required but has no blocks. Ad: :field is required but has no blocks. Add content in the editor after saving.
Content fetched from URLs in your prompt: Content fetched from URLs in your prompt (reader service)
URL context was truncated: reached the m: URL context was truncated: reached the maximum amount of fetched text.
e.g. Create a page about our company eve: e.g. Create a page about our company event last Friday. Include a summary, key highlights, and a call to action...
Choose the collection for your new entry: Choose the collection for your new entry.
Matched asset path(s) in the container: Matched asset path(s) in the container
Content was generated — open the entry i: Content was generated — open the entry in the editor to review all fields.
No collections with blueprints are avail: No collections with blueprints are available.
The AI returned no content. Check your p: The AI returned no content. Check your provider settings and try again.
Could not parse AI response as JSON. Ple: Could not parse AI response as JSON. Please try again.
AI response must be a JSON object, not a: AI response must be a JSON object, not an array.
:field: AI selected \":value\" which is: :field: AI selected ":value" which is not a valid option. Field left empty.
:field: AI provided invalid date \":valu: :field: AI provided invalid date ":value". Field left empty.
:field: link value \":value\" is not a v: :field: link value ":value" is not a valid URL or Statamic link reference.
Fallback link: no entry with slug \":slu: Fallback link: no entry with slug ":slug" in :collection for site :site.
No usable assets found in the container: No usable assets found in the container for :field.
Entry generation failed. Please try agai: Entry generation failed. Please try again.
Field regeneration failed. Please try ag: Field regeneration failed. Please try again.
The AI returned no text. Check that :mod: The AI returned no text. Check that :model is a valid Groq model name, or try a shorter prompt.
The AI returned no text. Check your Info: The AI returned no text. Check your Infomaniak product ID, model name, and prompt size.
Streaming is not supported for this AI p: Streaming is not supported for this AI provider.
Entry creation failed. Please try again.
When you paste a Figma file or frame lin: When you paste a Figma file or frame link in the entry generator, we fetch frame names and text layers via the official Figma REST API (OAuth). Register a redirect URL in your Figma app that matches the value below.
OAuth redirect URL (copy into Figma deve: OAuth redirect URL (copy into Figma developer app)
Only super admins can configure OAuth ap: Only super admins can configure OAuth app credentials.
A super admin must add the Figma OAuth a: A super admin must add the Figma OAuth app credentials before anyone can connect.
Could not save Figma app credentials.
Client secret is required on first save.
Navigation URL-only warning: These items link to URLs only (no page entries). Link labels will be translated with DeepL; the same URLs are kept. You may need to adjust URLs manually for each language if they should differ.
Navigation URL-only sync notice: URL-only links were copied with the same targets. Review and update URLs manually in the target language's navigation if needed.
Navigation sync intro: Mirrors the source site's navigation tree: same order, titles, and extra branch data; each branch points to the localized entry when one exists for that site.
Target languages help navigation merged: Pick one or more site languages below. Each line shows whether linked pages already exist or will be translated before the navigation is written.
No pages missing: All pages exist — only the navigation structure will be written.
Pages translated before sync: :count page(s) will be translated via DeepL first
Will sync the navigation structure to :c: Will sync the navigation structure to :count language(s), translating missing pages first.
Choose a navigation and target languages: Choose a navigation and target languages to sync.
Could not load navigation preview. Fix the error above or pick another navigation.
